name: Chow Mein Candy Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine noodles and nuts in mixing bowl.
2. In a small saucepan, combine honey, sugar, margarine, vanilla, and salt. Bring to full boil over moderate heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and add butterscotch morsels; stir until melted and smooth.
3. Pour the mixture over noodles and nuts; mix gently until well coated. Drop by heaping teaspoons onto waxed paper on a baking sheet.
4. Let stand until set or chill until firm. If desired, wrap individually in small squares of waxed paper.
